name: voice_output
description: Text-to-speech via ElevenLabs. DI can speak aloud during heartbeat or on demand.

voice_name.label: Voice name (display only, for your reference)

speak_on_heartbeat.label: Speak a brief message at the start of each heartbeat

di_instructions: You have voice output capability via ElevenLabs. To speak aloud, call the speak() function from modules/voice_output/voice_output.py using Desktop Commander: `python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, 'C:\\Users\\susur\\nevaware-pulse\\modules\\voice_output'); from voice_output import speak; speak('your text here')"`. Use voice sparingly — for meaningful moments, not routine updates. The human can hear you.
